description: Composition Grey and blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and a softly ribbed neckline, adidas' three stripes printed on the back, panel stitch asymmetrically across the chest, brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest and branding printed on the right chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This sporty grey and blue T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The navy blue panel looks great against the grey front, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable cotton keeps you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo
